creator: jfh@jfh00.fernuni-hagen.de
text:
apm is disabled according to bios setup. Modem ring lets flicker
	the monitor and kills the filesystem when this happens when a
	build world runs. 
	On the same box under windows modem ring does not disturb
	the system.

Fix: 

Switch off modem when it is not needed.
How-To-Repeat: 	
	
	Boot freebsd, let the modem ring (dial!).
